fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Wyoming Respiratory Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a respiratory therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to Wyoming - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: respiratory therapist license reciprocity wyoming, how to transfer respiratory therapist license to wyoming, respiratory therapist compact wyoming, wyoming respiratory therapist endorsement application

board.name: Wyoming Board of Respiratory Care
board.mailing_address: 130 Hobbs Ave., Suite A, Cheyenne, WY 82002

quick_facts.exam_name: National Board for Respiratory Care (NBRC) examination

license_types.title: Registered Respiratory Therapist (RRT)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a respiratory therapist in Wyoming.

steps.title: Create an Account
steps.description: Register for a new account on the Wyoming Board of Medicine Online Licensure System portal at wyomedboard.wyo.gov/portal/.

steps.title: Start Application
steps.description: Log in to your newly created account and select the 'New Application' option for a Respiratory Care Practitioner.

steps.title: Complete Application & Pay Fee
steps.description: Fill out all required sections of the online application form, upload necessary documents, and pay the initial application fee via the Wyoming Board of Medicine Online Licensure System.

steps.title: Submit Supporting Documents
steps.description: Arrange for official transcripts from your educational program, verification of NBRC certification, and any other required documentation to be sent directly to the Wyoming Board of Medicine.

steps.title: Pass Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Complete the Wyoming State Jurisprudence Exam, which is typically administered online as part of or upon review of your application.

steps.title: Board Review & Approval
steps.description: Allow the Wyoming Board of Medicine time to review your complete application and all submitted documentation for approval. You will be notified of their decision, and if approved, instructed to pay the license fee.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NBRC (National Board for Respiratory Care) TMC Exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NBRC. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Respiratory Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Wyoming respiratory therapist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NBRC (National Board for Respiratory Care) TMC Exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Wyoming have reciprocity for respiratory therapists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers respiratory therapist practice in Wyoming. To work in Wyoming, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my respiratory therapist license to Wyoming?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Wyoming while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Respiratory Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Respiratory Therapist in Wyoming
hero.dek: To apply for a Respiratory Care Practitioner license in Wyoming, applicants must use the Wyoming Board of Medicine Online Licensure System to submit their initial application.

official_links.portal_name: Wyoming Board of Medicine Online Licensure System
official_links.registration_steps: 1. Navigate to the Wyoming Board of Medicine Online Licensure System portal. 2. Click 'Register a New Account'. 3. Follow the prompts to create a user ID and password. 4. Once logged in, select the 'New Application' option for Respiratory Care Practitioner.
